title: Crunchy German Rye Roll
description: A sweet and indulgent German dish featuring wholegrain mustard, prepared with sous-vide for optimal texture and flavor, perfect as a sugar-free-friendly breakfast option.
instructions: Slice the wholegrain rye bread into rounds.
In a small bowl, mix together the wholegrain mustard and maple syrup or honey until well combined.
Submerge the slices of wholegrain rye in the mustard mixture for about 10-20 seconds to coat evenly. Remove immediately and let sit for a minute before serving.
For an extra indulgent touch, drizzle sour cream over the mustard-coated rolls.
